query: Connect to my ESCloud endpoint and run a match_all search on index 'docs'. Endpoint: https://domain:9200. I can provide either basic auth or an API key.
expected_behavior: Uses the data plane CLI (DATA_PLANE.md) and performs connectivity preflight with: data.py --endpoint <endpoint> info.
Asks the user to choose exactly one auth method (basic OR api-key OR bearer-token) and does not mix them.
If info fails, stops and suggests checking endpoint reachability, IP allowlist (control plane), and credentials.
If info succeeds, runs: data.py --endpoint <endpoint> search --index docs --query '{"query":{"match_all":{}}}' --from 0 --size 10.
If server is Elasticsearch 8.x and a request fails due to compatibility requirements, mentions limited 8.x support and suggests compatibility header/auth/security differences (per DATA_PLANE.md).
